macro.title: Tuccori opt-in settlements win preliminary approval
macro.what: A federal judge granted preliminary approval to $106M in Tuccori opt-in settlements, including $52.25M from NAR and $30M from HomeServices.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Higher Mortgage Rates Push Pending Home Sales Down for Second Straight Week
macro.what: Some would-be homebuyers are hesitating as housing costs rise and the ongoing Iran war makes the economy feel shaky
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: 29% of U.S. Homebuyers Paid Cash in March–the Lowest Share For That Month Since 2020
macro.what: With hundreds of thousands more home sellers than buyers in the market, fewer house hunters feel inclined to make cash offers to stand out in bidding wars
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: HMDA analysis shows wide gap in down payment assistance use
housing.what: An analysis of HMDA data by Down Payment Resource and Urban Institute found 43.6% of purchase mortgages are eligible for DPA, but usage lags.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: CoStar to buy Zonda from MidOcean Partners
housing.what: CoStar agreed to buy Zonda from MidOcean, adding NewHomeSource, Livabl and builder data
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: The case for Non-QM: Serving the new American workforce
housing.what: The modern American workforce is increasingly composed of freelancers, gig workers and entrepreneurs whose complex incomes don't fit traditional mortgage underwriting standards
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Anthony Lamacchia: Zillow-MRED battle shows risks of ‘listing war’
housing.what: Anthony Lamacchia breaks down the Chicago Zillow–MRED fight, Clear Cooperation and why an MLS “listing war” would hurt consumers and agents.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Coming Soon in Chicago: A One-Bedroom Condo in the City, a Big House in the Suburbs and More
housing.what: In this edition of Coming Soon–a series from Redfin News that explores new listings that house hunters can find early only on Redfin.com and Compass.com–we’re exploring five different listings in the Chicago metro area
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Just Listed in Maryland for $5M: An Unfinished Estate on 38 Acres That’s a Blank Canvas for Luxury Living
housing.what: In this edition of Just Listed–a series from Redfin News that explores homes that are listed by Redfin or Compass agents on Redfin.com–we’re exploring an unfinished estate in Maryland
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Investor Home Purchases Fall to Lowest Level Since 2020
housing.what: Elevated housing costs, a slower-than-usual housing market and a cooling rental market are squeezing potential returns for U.S
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: How Designers and Real Estate Pros Use Facebook Marketplace to Add Character to a Home
housing.what: Interior designers and real estate experts are turning to Facebook Marketplace, thrift stores, and estate sales to find one-of-a-kind pieces that add personality and warmth to a home
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: NAR urges DOJ and FTC to issue clear guidance on MLSs
notables.what: NAR asked DOJ and FTC to recognize MLSs as procompetitive and clarify low-risk sharing of historical property data and AI use.

notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: CMLS urges antitrust regulators to back MLS collaboration
notables.what: CMLS asked DOJ and FTC to recognize MLSs as pro-competitive, citing 230 MLSs, 1.7 million subscribers and data access benefits.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Fidelity data shows record retirement savings, rising Roth adoption
notables.what: Combined employer and employee contributions for 401(k) savers hit 14.4%, approaching Fidelity’s suggested 15% target.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
